titleStmt.title: SII 5.578: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 578. (A.R. No. 22 of 1895). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE MANGALAMBIKA SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . rājadrājanyamakuṭaśreṇiranneṣu śāsanam.e ta
drājendracoḷasya parakesarivarmmaṇaḥ .. tiru maṉṉi vaḷa
ra Irunila maṭaṉtaiyum poṟceyap pāvaiyum ci
rttaṉic celviyum taṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟu ṉeṭutuyal lūḻi
yuḷ Iṭaituṟaiṉāṭum tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭar vaṉavāciyum cuḷḷic
cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum ṉaṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇai
kkaṭakkamum porutaṭa riḻattaraicartam muṭiyum Āṅkavaṉ te
viya(r) roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavar vai
tta cuṉtaramuṭiyum Iṉtira ṉāramum teṉṟicai Īḻamaṇṭalam mu
ḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭum kulataṉamā
kiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait tol
peruṅkāval pala paḻaṉtivum māpperuṉ taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparake
carivanma rāṉa śrīrājentra coḷade vaṟku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu ṉittavinotavaḷa
ṉāṭṭuk kiḻāṟkūṟṟattu Āyirattaḷippāṟ śrīvāṉavaṉmāteviśvara muṭaiyār te
vatāṉam Iṉṉāṭṭu muṭiccoḻaṉāṭṭu paṭṭakaḷ kaṭampūr Uḷḷiṟaṅkal nilam Añce
mukkāle ṉāṉkumāviṉ kiḻmukkāliṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ rā jakecariyāl Āṇṭuva
rai nellu Aiññūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu Aṅkalaṉe patakku ṉāṉāḻi Iṉ
nivaṉtañ ceytu kallil veṭṭivikkaveṉṟu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷaṉāṭṭu veṇ
ṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam keraḷān=ta kacaturvvedi maṅkalattu Irāmaṉ Arumoḻiyāna Ut
tamacoḻabrahmamārā yaṉ colla Uṭaiyār śrīrājentra coḷadeva kaittu
naṉ tevaṉ cūṟṟiyaṉum caṅkaraṉṉ and ca are written as a group.cāttaṉum kaṇkāṇiyāka Irun tu kalli
l veṭṭivittapaṭi Uṭaiyārkku san=ti Oṉṟukku tiruvamutu Ari[ci nāṉāḻiyā
ka muṉṟu caṉtikkut tiruvamutarici kuṟuṇi ṉāṉāḻiyum Umā tarkku
san=ti Oṉṟukkut tiruvamutarici nāṉāḻiyum A
ṉṟukku tiruvamutarici patakkukku Añciraṇṭu vaṇṇa
ttāl nellu Aiṅkuṟuṇiyum Uṭaiyārkku san=ti Oṉṟukku kaṟiya
mutukku nellu muḻākkāka muṉṟu san=ti kku nellu I
runāḻi Uḻakkum santi Oṉṟukku paruppamutu Āḻākkāka muṉ
ṟu san=ti kku Uḻak kāḻākkukkum paruppu nāḻikku nellu muṉṉāḻiyāka
nellu nāḻi Āḻākkum san=ti Oṉṟukku neyyamutu Iru ceviṭaraiyāka muṉ
ṟu san=ti kku neyyamutu Āḻākke Iruce viṭaraiyum ney nāḻikku ne
lluttūṇiyāka nellu Aṟunāḻiyum san=ti Oṉṟukku tayiramitu Uriya
āka muṉṟu san=ti kku n=ta yiramutu nāḻi Urikkum Iraṭṭi nellu muṉṉāḻiyum
[san=ti] Oṉṟukku Aṭaikkāyamutu nālukkum Ilaiyamutu Eṭṭukkum Āka
nellu muḻākkāka muṉṟu san=ti kku ḷa Irunāḻi Uḻakku tiruvamutu kaṟiyamutu 8- m
santi Oṉṟukku viṟakukku nellu nāḻiyāka muṉṟu san=ti kku muṉṉāḻiyum
Irava pakal Eriyun tirunon=tā viḷakku Iraṇṭukku Eṇṇai Uḻak kāḻākkum ci
ṟukālai Eriyum san=ti viḷakku Iraṇṭum Ucciyampo teriyum san=ti viḷak
kiraṇṭum Irā veriyum san=ti viḷakku nālum Āka san=ti viḷakku Eṭṭukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkum
Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukkut tiruviḷakku Eṇṇai Uri Āḻākkukku Eṇṇai nāḻikku nellut tū
ṇiyāka nellup patakku nāṉāḻiyum Ākat tirucceṉṉaṭaikkum ney Eṇṇai tayi
r kaṟi viṟaku Aṭaikkāyamutukkum Āka nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu Irutūṇik kuṟuṇi Aiññāḻi
Uri yāḻākkāka Āṇṭuvarai nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟu Aṟupatukku nellu Iruṉūṟṟut to(ṇ)
ṇṇūṟ ṟorukalane kuṟuṇi Orunāḻi sa ṅkirān=ti Oṉṟukku veṇṭum pala vicattukku
nellu Irukalane patakku Iruṉāḻiyāka dakṣi ṇamayaṉamum Aippikai viṣu vum Uttarama
yaṉamu cittirai viṣu vum Āka Āṇṭuvarai caṅkirān=ti nālukku nellu Eṇakalaṉe Iru tūṇi
k kuṟuṇi tirumeyppūccukku Āṇṭuvarai can=ta ṇam nāṟpattaim palattukku kā
cu Oṉṟe Araikkālukku kācu Oṉṟukku nellu nāṟkalamāka nellu nāṟkala
ṉe tūṇip patakku tiruppukaikku Āṇṭuvarai kuṅkuliyam toṇṇūṟṟup pala
ttukkuk kācu Araikku nellu Irukalam Āṇṭuvarai tirupparicaṭṭam muṉṟukkum tirumeṟ
kaṭṭi Oṉṟukkum tirunamaṉikai Iraṇṭum Uttariyyap puṭavai nālukkumākak kācu Ira
ṇṭukku nellup patiṉkalam gra haṇamuḷḷiṭṭa ciṟappukkaḷukku nellu Irukalaṉe
Irunāḻi Uri putiyi tamituceytaruḷa nellu mukkalam kārttikai viḷakkiṉu
kku Eṇṇai nāṉāḻikku nelluk kalaṉe tūṇi Āka
Āṇṭuvarai nellu muṉṉūṟṟu Irupattu Irukalane Irutūṇi
Irunāḻi Uriyum Ivaiyiṟṟukku kalattuvarik kuṟuṇiyāka kuttak kūli
nellu Irupattu Aṟukalaṉe Irutūṇip patakku muññāḻi yuri
yum maṭamuṭaiya lakuḷiśvara paṇṭitaṟku Ācāriyapokamu
m tiruvārātiṉai ceyvā ṉoruvaṉukkumāka nāḷoṉṟu
yum paricārakañ ceyu mā
ṇ Oṉṟukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyāka civabrāhma ṇaṉ kauśika ṉ Amaḷa
ṉ Aṟupattu nālvapaṭṭaṉ māṇ Iraṇṭukku nāḷoṉṟukku
nellup patakkum civabrāhma ṇaṉ pullāli Uṟāppakai mā
ṇikkapaṭṭaṉ māṇoṉṟukku nāḷoṉṟukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyu
m civabrāhma ṇaṉ bhāradvāji Aiyyaṭikaḷ Aiyāṟaṉ māṇoṉṟu
kku nāḷoṉṟukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum karaṇattāṉ kiḷinallū
rkiḻavaṉ Araṅkaṉ Irāmaṉukku nā(ḷ)ḷoṉṟukku nelluk ku
ṟuṇiyum tiruvalaku tirumeḻukkiṭuvā ḷoruttikku nellu nāḻi U
riyum Āka nivan=ta kkāṟkku nāḷ Oṉṟukku nellu Irutūṇi Orunāḻi
Uriyāka Āṇṭuvarai nivan=ta kkāṟkku nellu Irunūṟṟu nāṟpat
taiṅkalane Eḻukuṟuṇi nāṉāḻiyum Āka Āṇṭuvarai rā jakecariyāl
nellu Aiññūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟu Aiṅkalaṉe patakku nāṉāḻi nellu
Aṟamaṟavaṟka Aṟamallatu kaitārāte Itu panā heśvara
rakṣai ḥ.ḥ
Digital edition of SII 5.578 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
